cfr.macro_value: do { \ if ((c).nc < (c).cs) { \ OC_MEMSET ((r), 0xdf, sizeof(otype)); \ ((otype **)((c).data))[(c).nc++] = (r); \ } else \ xfree (r); \ } while (0)

functions.reason: Frees positional dollar variable fields via FREE

functions.name: free_saved_dollar_vars
functions.reason: Frees caller-passed array of saved dollar variable strings

functions.name: dispose_saved_dollar_vars
functions.reason: Frees saved dollar var memory via dispose_words/free; acts as a release of owned fields

functions.name: FREE_EXPORTSTR
functions.reason: Macro frees var->exportstr field

functions.name: INVALIDATE_EXPORTSTR
functions.reason: Frees var->exportstr and nulls pointer

functions.name: xfree
functions.reason: Wrapper around free() for caller-owned memory

cfr.name: xfree
cfr.documentation: Use this as the function to call when adding unwind protects so we don't need to know what free() returns.

functions.name: free_string_list
functions.reason: Frees a string list via FREE/free, dedicated release function

functions.name: free_pushed_string_input
functions.reason: Releases pushed string input by delegating to free_string_list

cfr.name: free_pushed_string_input
cfr.documentation: #endif /* ALIAS || DPAREN_ARITHMETIC
